Türkçe

We held our panel titled “Artificial Intelligence in Design” organized by Kadir Has University, Faculty of Art and Design on Friday, May 24, 2024. We would like to thank all our participants for creating a productive and enjoyable discussion environment. We hope to meet you in new events where we will continue to talk about the place of artificial intelligence tools in design.
